SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GREEN, NORMAN DBA (HELP U SELL) KEVORKIAN, SEVAN DBA (HELP U SELL) AS TO DEFENDANT MCCANN, SUE ELLEN BOLT, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREEN, NORMAN DBA (HELP U SELL) KEVORKIAN, SEVAN DBA (HELP U SELL) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCANN, SUE ELLEN BOLT, DAVID $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $404.00, COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFFS MOVED OUT ON NOVEMBER 26TH, NOT NOVEMBER 28TH AND ARE OWED $150.00/DAY REFUND. AS TO THE ADDITIONAL $3,600.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT, COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO PROVIDE SUFFICIENT PROOF OF PAYMENT. FINALLY, COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANTS ITEMIZATION OF AMOUNTS BEING WITHHELD FROM THE SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS TIMELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
